mapper.select: SELECT content_id, user_id, content_kind, category, location, title, description, reservation_type, DATE(start_at) AS start_at, DATE(end_at) AS end_at, adult_price, teen_price, child_price, main_image_path, detail_description, is_active, is_delete, content_time, instagram_url, x_url, content_status, place_tag FROM content WHERE content_id = #{content_id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE content
title = #{title}, location = #{location}, category = #{category}, place_tag = #{place_tag}, reservation_type = #{reservation_type}, start_at = #{start_at}, end_at = #{end_at}, description = #{description}, adult_price = #{adult_price}, teen_price = #{teen_price}, child_price = #{child_price}, detail_description = #{detail_description}, content_time = #{content_time}, instagram_url = #{instagram_url}, x_url = #{x_url}, content_status = #{content_status}, is_active = #{is_active}, is_delete = #{is_delete}, place_tag = #{place_tag} WHERE content_id = #{content_id}
